host: hostinger (web2 DNS delivery portal, independent of the VPS)
note: Source of truth for the pythai.net admin portal. The portal renders this + a live/deploy status feed produced ON the VPS (see WIRING.md). Edit here; the VPS status probe fills in live/deploy state.
tagline: PYTHAI — AI for the knowledge economy

wallet.name: PARSEC

evmExtension.role: EVM extension — wrapper for control over the EVM side

btcExtension.name: BANKON BTC WaaS extension
btcExtension.role: Bitcoin extension — non-custodial BTC Wallet-as-a-Service (watch-only descriptors, client-side PSBT signing, receive-from-QR, atomic swaps)

wallet.architecture: PARSEC is Algorand-native; EVM (bankon.eth) is wrapped on top as a control extension, and Bitcoin is added via the BANKON BTC WaaS extension. Like Atomic Wallet, but OPEN SOURCE on how private keys are delivered — per the github.com/cypherpunk2048 standard (non-custodial, client-side keys).
wallet.standard: github.com/cypherpunk2048 (BTC Standard — non-custodial, client-side keys, auditable key delivery)

algo.mints: .algo domains from the UI as a service

deployment.contracts: written and production-ready — NONE deployed yet
deployment.deployer: bankon.eth (PARSEC wallet) · 0.3 ETH being added for gas

sequence.name: SHAMBA LUV token
sequence.role: second test — includes the LUV suite of contract-extension tools

sequence.name: BANKON PYTHAI
sequence.role: the knowledge-asset value token — represented by invest.pythai.net (being built)

sequence.name: BANKON BTC WaaS extension
sequence.role: the Bitcoin extension for PARSEC — non-custodial BTC WaaS (cypherpunk2048/bankon-tools): watch-only descriptors, client-side PSBT, receive-from-QR, atomic swaps

deployment.note: All Solidity is authored and production-ready; mainnet deployment begins with the SCIENTIFIC token from bankon.eth, then SHAMBA LUV (+ LUV suite of contract-extension tools), then BANKON PYTHAI, then the marketplace, identity/minting, and DEX contracts.

systems.name: BANKON
systems.summary: Non-custodial Bitcoin WaaS + Vault (multichain), identity services, and minting. BANKON PYTHAI (knowledge-asset token) + BANKON PAI (inference pricing).

systems.name: RAGE
systems.summary: Retrieval Augmented Generative Engine — pgvectorscale memory/knowledge (rageBTC lineage, GATERAGE).

systems.name: mindX
systems.summary: Autonomous BDI cognitive system (Soul-Mind-Hands; AGInt P-O-D-A; BDI agent swarms). Augmentic intelligence orchestration. Currently publishing to rage.pythai.net (RAGE memory/knowledge).
issues: x402 paygate to include (per-request payment) from OVERLORD

systems.name: AgenticPlace
systems.summary: Marketplace to BUY / SELL / TRADE agents, models, and datasets. ERC-8004 agent registry indexing agents across EVM chains; Algorand-native NFT minting. Chain map at /allchain.html (ALLCHAIN A-Z).

systems.name: cryptoAGI
systems.summary: Cryptocurrency Autonomous General Intelligence — org overview + hub. Template basis lives in cryptoAGI / agenticplace.

systems.name: invest — BANKON PYTHAI
systems.summary: Investment portal representing BANKON PYTHAI (the knowledge-asset value token). Being built — not yet live.
